# Mar Sea

**Summary**: A standard 2D seismic survey model used for testing and benchmarking imaging algorithms.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] used the Marmousi model to demonstrate the effectiveness of the visco-acoustic PSPI algorithm.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015]] Standard benchmark for seismic processing

## Key Findings From This Location

- The Marmousi model provided a clear comparison between acoustic and visco-acoustic processing results. ([[2015-mohammed|Mohammed, 2015, p. 70]])
